trigger: task-2 (design) completion — evidence revealed free-text search surface (~1M rows), new table with foreign keys, and a categorization backfill for existing search events.
summary: Design evidence sharpened scope: existing storage lacks full-text indexing, query volume will grow to ~1M rows, and per-user saved lists require a new table + backfill. Augmenting the chain with migration and data-engineering tasks; rigor upgraded with explicit WHY.

priors.why: Surfaced the migration + indexing requirement that triggered re-evaluation.

reversibility.why: New table + backfill narrows rollback; additive but not trivial to undo once populated.

blast_radius.why: Still bounded to search subsystem + new table; index build has DB-wide cost.

compliance_scope.why: Saved searches are user-owned; no new regulated surface.

user_facing_impact.why: Unchanged — users still see the feature.

novelty.why: Full-text index on this dataset is new territory; raises effort vs. pass 1.

scope_effort.why: Adds a migration + index build + backfill on top of UI/API work.

state_complexity.why: New table, foreign keys, categorization backfill, and a full-text index.

operational_risk.why: Index build and backfill can pressure DB; need batching + observation.

coordination_cost.why: Adds migration + data-engineering hands; still one coherent team.

specialists.name: test-designer
specialists.why: Carry-over from pass 1 — will expand coverage to migration + performance.

specialists.name: migration-engineer
specialists.why: AUGMENTED: design revealed a new table + foreign keys + backfill for existing search events.

specialists.name: data-engineer
specialists.why: AUGMENTED: full-text index decision + 1M-row query path needs a data pipeline owner.

phases.name: design
phases.why: Completed in pass 1 — evidence triggered this re-evaluation.

phases.name: test-strategy
phases.why: Carry-over; expand to include migration + performance.

phases.name: build
phases.why: Pass 1 build tasks proceed; new migration + indexing tasks join the build phase.

phases.name: review
phases.why: Review now covers rollback plan + performance baseline.

rigor_why: Emergent migration is handled with a rollback plan + performance baseline but stays within standard because no compliance amplifier surfaced; plan notes escalation to full if backfill window exceeds a business day.
complexity_why: Bumped from 4 → 5: migration + indexing add cross-subsystem coordination without crossing into compliance territory.

tasks.title: Design + execute saved-search table migration (FKs, index)
Build full-text index pipeline + backfill existing search events

augmented.reason: design revealed new table + foreign keys + backfill
full-text index decision + 1M-row query path needs a data pipeline owner

re_tiered.why: Escalation considered; compliance did not fire, so kept at standard with explicit migration + perf evidence.

re_evaluation.process_plan_addendum: Re-evaluation 2026-04-17 — augmented migration-engineer + data-engineer, added migration-rollback-plan and performance-baseline, complexity 4→5.
